name: Rhubarb-Peach Jam (Mw)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the peaches and combine all ingredients in a microwave-safe bowl.
2. Cover the surface of the mixture with waxed paper.
3. Microwave on high for 7-10 minutes, until it comes to a full boil.
4. Remove the waxed paper and cook on high for an additional 15-25 minutes, stirring frequently during the last 10 minutes, until very syrupy.
Store in jam jars. This recipe freezes well too.
